title: syringa × chinensis
intro: Syringa × chinensis, also known as the Chinese lilac or double-flowered lilac, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Oleaceae family. Traditionally, the plant's flowers and leaves have been used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Syringa × chinensis include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce fever, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Syringa × chinensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
